prompt:
Goal: editorial illustration for a programming textbook
Scene: A retro-futuristic control panel dashboard with five large labeled buttons arranged in a row. Button 1 "build" (blue, hammer icon): display shows "tsc" compiling. Button 2 "test" (green, checkmark icon): display shows test results running. Button 3 "start" (orange, play triangle icon): display shows the app launching. Button 4 "lint" (yellow, magnifying glass icon): display shows code being checked. Button 5 "dev" (purple, refresh icon): display shows watch mode active. A hand hovers over the "build" button about to press it. The panel has a satisfying industrial feel with indicator lights and gauges.
Style: Head First book illustration style, clean lines, slightly whimsical and humorous, warm colors, educational
Aspect ratio: 16:9
Background: white
Text in image: minimal or none
Avoid: photorealistic, dark, scary, complex UI screenshots
